world.title: Strengthening Food Security and Livelihoods through Cash Assistance (Haiti)
world.description: Deadline: 24-Apr-2026 The World Food Programme (WFP) invites grant applications to implement cash transfer activities for internally displaced households in Haiti’s Ouest department. The project targets 9,129 households, aiming to address urgent food security, malnutrition, and social protection needs while promoting community resilience and longer-term support. Overview of the Initiative The World Food Programme (WFP)

world.title: Trio Conference champions Afrocentric governance, multilingualism and transformation
world.description: The Riverside Hotel in Vanderbijlpark recently buzzed with intellectual energy as academics, students, policymakers and thought leaders from across Africa gathered for the North-West University (NWU) Trio Conference on Afrocentric Governance, Multilingualism and Transformation. Over three days, participants from South Africa, Uganda, Nigeria, Zimbabwe, Tanzania, Malawi and Lesotho and beyond convened to reimagine the development of Africa through an Afrocentric lens – grounded in indigenous knowledge, African languages and cultural values.

business.title: Before Gulf burns again, how India is racing to safeguard its oil supply | Explained
business.description: India imports nearly 90 per cent of its crude oil, and roughly a fifth of that passes through the Gulf. When that pipeline is threatened, the consequences land quickly, at petrol pumps, in household LPG bills, and across an economy still finding its footing.

business.title: Wind power with vision: World’s first turbine with CO₂-reduced steel tower and recyclable rotor blades installed at Denmark’s largest offshore wind farm
business.description: RWE has installed the world’s first offshore wind turbine featuring a CO₂ reduced steel tower and recyclable rotor blades. This marks a major milestone in the construction of the 1.1 gigawatt Thor offshore wind farm off Denmark’s west coast and represents a pioneering step towards further improving the sustainability performance of offshore wind.

business.title: 1:1 Bonus Share + 140% Dividend: Nifty Smallcap firm declares double delight for shareholders along with Q4 results
business.description: Anand Rathi Wealth Limited on Thursday reported a rise in its consolidated net profit to Rs 103.45 crore for the fourth quarter ended March 31, 2026. The board has recommended a final dividend of Rs 7 per equity share, representing 140 per cent of the face value of Rs 5 each, for the financial year 2025-26. The company has also recommended the issuance of bonus shares in the ratio of 1:1.

ai.title: New Delhi: Galgotias University Faces Backlash Over Global Ranking Ads And AI Summit Robot Controversy
ai.description: Galgotias University faced backlash after ads claiming global recognition sparked online criticism. The outrage intensified following an India AI Summit incident where a robotic dog showcased as in-house innovation was identified as a Unitree Go2 product. Critics questioned transparency, damaging the institution’s credibility.
